description: Creates a custom framework in AWS Audit Manager.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^(?!aws:)[a-zA-Z+-=._:/]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Type: String

Maximum Length: 36

Update requires: No interruption

ControlSetControl.markdownDescription:
A reference to an existing control by ID.
